title: Afterimage
description: Whenever you play a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
smart_description: Whenever you play a card, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the current stack count.
notes: Counter-type power that increments each time a card is played. The Block gained equals the current stack counter value, making the benefit scale with the number of cards played.
